description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that first runs a before_script to download rustup.sh with curl -sSf https://static.rust-lang.org/rustup.sh > rustup.sh and installs the Rust toolchain via bash ./rustup.sh -y --disable-sudo. Define a build job in the default build stage that executes the exact command cargo build. Define a test job in the default test stage that executes the exact command cargo test. Use the runner's default Docker image (no explicit image or services), and do not configure any caches, artifacts, or special rules for triggering the jobs.
